problem id: 303d3288
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(6) XOR SHR(7)

examples:
  10011100 -> 00000001
  11110100 -> 00000001
  11011111 -> 11000001
  01010000 -> 00000000
  00110110 -> 10000000
  11010111 -> 11000001
  10010010 -> 10000001
  01111101 -> 01000000
  10000010 -> 10000001

query: 01000101
predicted answer: 01000000
